meaning: n.(俄国)沙皇,<美>大权独揽的人,独裁者,专制君主
examples: In return, the Czar sent him a troop of his best soldiers.
The husband and wife were like czar and peasant, chairman of the board, and receptionist.
He promised to appoint an AIDS czar to deal with the disease.
After the czar died in 1894, his son Nicholas continued the tradition until the 1917 revolution.
Deposed Obama-Biden administration green czar Van Jones serves as its green projects marketing director.
